name: copilot
title: Copilot Usage
description: View GitHub Copilot premium request usage across multiple accounts.
author: CaffeineCat

commands.name: view-copilot-usage
commands.title: View Copilot Usage
commands.subtitle: GitHub Copilot
commands.description: View GitHub Copilot premium request usage for all signed-in accounts.

commands.name: list-chat-sessions
commands.title: List Chat Sessions
commands.subtitle: VS Code Copilot
commands.description: Browse all local VS Code Copilot chat sessions and open them in their workspace.

preferences.name: vscodeVariant
preferences.title: VS Code Variant
preferences.description: Which VS Code variant to read sessions from.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
